overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a historic palace garden with geometric hedge mazes and classical brick architecture. The character walks along terraces, through formal gardens, and across grassy grounds under a partly cloudy summer sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone terrace adjacent to historic palace building

events.description: character stops walking and looks around at the garden and building facades

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated terrace beside the historic brick building, pausing to observe the formal gardens

entered.detail: large classical brick building with tall windows and stone columns
formal garden with intricate geometric hedge patterns and pathways
elevated paved walkway running alongside the building

segments.scene_description: The character begins on a stone terrace beside a grand historic brick building with classical architecture. The formal geometric gardens stretch out ahead under a partly cloudy sky. The character walks along the terrace, pausing briefly to look around at the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden with geometric hedge maze patterns

agents.ego_description: navigating through the geometric garden paths, walking between the patterned hedge formations

entered.detail: tall brick walls enclosing the garden perimeter
scattered mature trees lining the garden edge

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the terrace into the formal garden, walking through intricate geometric hedge patterns. The historic building recedes behind as the character navigates the maze-like pathways. Brick walls and trees line the perimeter of the garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: perimeter walkway between garden walls and tree line

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy perimeter path beside tall garden walls and scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The character follows a narrow grassy path between the geometric garden beds and a tall brick wall. Trees cast shadows over the path as the character continues along the perimeter of the garden enclosure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy field enclosed by brick walls

events.description: character ascends stone steps and drops down into the lower grassy field

agents.ego_description: climbing up to a higher terrace then dropping down into the grassy field, continuing to walk across the open area

entered.detail: open flat grassy area with scattered wildflowers
short flight of stone steps leading up from the garden

segments.scene_description: The character ascends steps to an upper level then drops down into a wide grassy field. The historic building becomes visible again in the distant left as the character walks across the open grass toward the enclosing brick walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand architectural terrace through a structured hedge maze and into an open grassy field. It begins on a stone terrace beside a historic brick building, where the camera pauses to survey the formal geometric gardens stretching out under a partly cloudy sky. As the character descends from the terrace, the scene shifts into the heart of the garden, navigating intricate hedge patterns while the building recedes into the background. The camera then follows a narrow grassy path along a tall brick wall shaded by trees before ascending a set of steps. Finally, the view opens up as the character drops into a wide grassy field, with the historic building reappearing in the distance to the left.
